name: shophub-goal-runner
description: Run the ShopHub design-implementation consistency competition workflow from the current repository.

interface.shortDescription: Finish the ShopHub consistency competition from the current repo
interface.longDescription: A deterministic Goal Runner for the ShopHub design-implementation consistency competition. Use /shophub in the CLI from a repo containing code/, design-docs/, test-cases/, API基线文档.md, 黑盒用例说明.md, and 比赛说明.md. The command builds design/API/code indexes, runs Maven tests, audits inconsistencies, fixes code in small evidence-backed rounds, guards the frozen REST API contract, and writes 修复报告.md.
defaultPrompt: Use ShopHub Goal Runner on this repo
